workshoptitle: Build multimodal AI Vector Search using Oracle Private AI Services Container

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Overview of the workshop architecture and outcomes.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Login to JupyterLab and work with Notebooks
tutorials.description: Learn the JupyterLab basics used throughout the workshop: launcher, notebooks, code cells, Markdown cells, and terminal access.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Verify the Runtime Environment
tutorials.description: Validate that JupyterLab, Private AI Services Container, Oracle AI Database, and ORDS are reachable.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Vector Search with ONNX Model Stored in Oracle Database
tutorials.description: Run semantic search with a model stored in Oracle AI Database using provider=database.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Vector Search with Oracle Private AI Services Container
tutorials.description: Run semantic search with embeddings generated by Oracle Private AI Services Container.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Flask Image Search with CLIP Models using Oracle Private AI Services Container
tutorials.description: Build a Flask app that embeds images and text with CLIP models in Private AI and returns top-10 similar images.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: How to choose the right model? Compare Embedding Models in JupyterLab
tutorials.description: Use a simple notebook to compare Private AI text embedding models by result quality and request time.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving live help.
